note: Camera node present, identity transform. Floor: with a perspective Camera the base drop-zone must still render == imageA in BOTH engines. If this FAILs, the camera insertion itself perturbs the projection and every other persp.* node is unreliable.

Y-rotation 30deg WITH a camera (perspective fold). This is the core 3D-fold projection (perspective.ts). Camera-less would be a FALSE FAIL (headless folds, GUI orthographic); with a camera GUI+headless agree, so headless is a valid oracle.
Y-rotation 60deg — steeper fold, larger foreshortening. Stresses the perspective divide (w-clip) more than 30deg.
X-rotation 40deg (vertical fold about horizontal axis). Verifies the X-axis of the 3D rotation matrix + perspective, distinct from Y.

Z push -400 (card recedes from camera, shrinks under perspective). Verifies the Z translate + perspective scale (z-composite depth), NOT an in-plane scale. Camera required (camera-less GUI = orthographic = no shrink).
Z pull +300 (card approaches camera, enlarges). Sign + magnitude of the perspective depth scale in the opposite direction from push.
Y-fold 45deg + off-center X translate. Verifies the compose order (rotate about anchor then translate) under perspective — the exact composition the fold Movements use.
